description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this purple bag from nike will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go shopping, for a movie or to college. It's large enough to accommodate all your essentials and neat enough to get you loads of attention from strangers!MeasurementHeight: 33 cmWidth: 46 cmDepth: 11 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of 100% polyester on the outside with 84% nylon and 16% polyester lining on the inside for enhanced durability and styleOne main roomy zippered compartment with an inner zippered pocket and a mesh organiser sleeve to hold essentialsTwo long handles for carrying easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy usenike Swoosh embroidered on the front and branding printedOne coin pouch for enhanced space and convenienceCareDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
